meaning: independent software vendor,独立软件开发商
examples: An ISV or internally written application.
Examples: ISV software developer, retail back-office worker.
ISV VENTURE STAR hangs suspended against the dark side of PANDORA.
Not every ISV shopping for a cloud data platform or Platform-as-a-Service (PaaS) needs that scale, though.
But what about the risk that SAP could end up building its own app that competes with an ISV?
